Services

Find the right home energy service for your home.

We diagnose before we prescribe, then recommend the next step that will actually improve comfort and bills.

Audit first

Room-by-room findings and roadmap.

Seal and insulate

Air sealing and thermal upgrades.

Plan the future

Phased electrification strategy.

Which service fits?

  • High bills and uneven rooms: start with an audit.
  • Drafts and cold attic rooms: start with insulation and air sealing.
  • Thermostat confusion: start with setup and scheduling.
  • Heat pump or EV goals: start with electrification planning.

Timeline

Most homeowners begin with diagnosis, then move into one focused project at a time so the work stays manageable.

BrightPath Home Energy

Home energy assessments, comfort upgrades, and practical electrification planning.
